name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/day tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/day, delayed tracking updates cause late orders. We aggregate daily shipment tracking updates and send exception alerts instead of manual tracking and updates via email or spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to track shipment exceptions in real-time, leading to delayed responses.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to track shipment exceptions in real-time, leading to delayed responses.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/day, delayed tracking updates cause late orders. We aggregate daily shipment tracking updates and send exception alerts instead of manual tracking and updates via email or spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and updates via email or spreadsheets
